---
author: "geol"
subtitle: "Automated Technology Lifecycle Audit"
date: last-modified
description: "End-of-Life analysis for software components based on endoflife.date API."
keywords: [EOL, Security, Compliance, DevOps]
params:
  config_file: ".geol.yaml"
  additional_context: ""
format: 
  html:
    theme:
      dark: darkly
      light: flatly
    quarto-color-scheme:
      default: dark
      toggle: true
    toc: true
    toc-location: right
    toc-title: "Navigation"
    code-fold: true
    embed-resources: true
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/font-awesome/6.5.1/css/all.min.css">
        <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdn.datatables.net/1.13.7/css/jquery.dataTables.min.css">
        <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdn.datatables.net/buttons/2.4.2/css/buttons.dataTables.min.css">
        <style>
        /* Force Font Awesome Visibility */
        .fa-solid, .fa-brands, .fas, .fa {
            font-family: "Font Awesome 6 Free", "Font Awesome 6 Brands" !important;
            font-weight: 900 !important;
            display: inline-block !important;
            font-style: normal !important;
            font-variant: normal !important;
            text-rendering: auto !important;
            -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased !important;
        }
        body.quarto-dark { background-color: #222 !important; color: #eee !important; }
        .quarto-dark .metric-card { background: #2d2d2d; border: 1px solid #444; }
        .thead-dark th { background-color: #333 !important; }
        .fa-circle-check, .status-ok { color: #50fa7b !important; }
        .fa-circle-exclamation, .status-eol { color: #ff5555 !important; }
        .fa-circle-question, .status-skip { color: #8be9fd !important; }
        .fa-triangle-exclamation, .status-warning { color: #ffb86c !important; }
        .fa-shield-halved { color: #8be9fd !important; margin-left: 8px !important; }
        .fa-fire-flame-curved { color: #ff5555 !important; }
        .metric-card { border-radius: 8px; padding: 20px; text-align: center; border: 1px solid #ddd; margin-bottom: 20px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; justify-content: center; min-height: 140px; }
        .metric-icon { font-size: 1.8rem; margin-bottom: 10px; opacity: 0.8; }
        .metric-value { font-size: 2.5rem; font-weight: bold; display: block; }
        .metric-label { font-size: 1rem; color: #aaa; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 1px; }
        .finding-box { padding: 15px 20px; border-radius: 8px; margin: 20px 0; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 15px; border-left: 5px solid; }
        .finding-critical { background-color: rgba(255, 85, 85, 0.1); border-color: #ff5555; color: #ff5555; }
        .finding-warning { background-color: rgba(255, 184, 108, 0.1); border-color: #ffb86c; color: #ffb86c; }
        .finding-safe { background-color: rgba(80, 250, 123, 0.1); border-color: #50fa7b; color: #50fa7b; }
        .finding-icon { font-size: 1.5rem; }
        .finding-text { font-size: 1.1rem; font-weight: 500; }

        /* Pro Tip Visibility */
        .protip-box code {
            background-color: #444 !important;
            color: #fff !important;
            padding: 2px 5px !important;
            border-radius: 3px !important;
        }

        .report-header { text-align: center; margin-bottom: 30px; }
        .report-header h1 { font-size: 2.5rem; font-weight: 700; }
        
        /* Executive One-Pager Print Mode */
        @media print {
            body, .quarto-container, #quarto-content {
                background-color: white !important;
                color: black !important;
            }
            .report-header h1 { color: black !important; margin-top: 0; }
            .metric-card {
                background: white !important;
                border: 2px solid #333 !important;
                color: black !important;
                break-inside: avoid;
            }
            .metric-label { color: #444 !important; }
            .status-ok, .status-eol, .status-warning, .status-skip { color: black !important; font-weight: bold !important; }
            
            /* Hide interactive/digital-only elements */
            .dt-buttons, .dataTables_filter, .dataTables_length, .dataTables_paginate, .dataTables_info,
            #quarto-sidebar, .toc-actions, #TOC, .navbar, .quarto-color-scheme-toggle {
                display: none !important;
            }
            
            /* Expand tables to full length */
            table { width: 100% !important; border-collapse: collapse !important; }
            table.dataTable tbody tr { background-color: white !important; color: black !important; }
            .thead-dark th { background-color: #eee !important; color: black !important; border: 1px solid #333 !important; }
            td { border: 1px solid #ddd !important; }
            
            /* Ensure charts are visible (or consider hiding sunburst if too complex for print) */
            .js-plotly-plot { margin-bottom: 20px; }
            
            /* Add page break control */
            h2 { page-break-before: always; margin-top: 30px !important; }
            h2:first-of-type { page-break-before: avoid; }
            .finding-box { border: 2px solid black !important; background: transparent !important; color: black !important; }
        }
        </style>

        <script>
        // Runtime FA loader (required because embed-resources cannot inline webfonts)
        (function() {
            var link = document.createElement('link');
            link.rel = 'stylesheet';
            link.href = 'https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/font-awesome/6.5.1/css/all.min.css';
            document.head.appendChild(link);
        })();
        </script>
        <script src="https://code.jquery.com/jquery-3.7.0.min.js"></script>
        <script src="https://cdn.datatables.net/1.13.7/js/jquery.dataTables.min.js"></script>
        <script src="https://cdn.datatables.net/buttons/2.4.2/js/dataTables.buttons.min.js"></script>
        <script src="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/jszip/3.10.1/jszip.min.js"></script>
        <script src="https://cdn.datatables.net/buttons/2.4.2/js/buttons.html5.min.js"></script>
        <script src="https://cdn.datatables.net/buttons/2.4.2/js/buttons.print.min.js"></script>
        <script src="https://cdn.datatables.net/buttons/2.4.2/js/buttons.colVis.min.js"></script>
---

```{python}
#| tags: [parameters]
#| echo: false
config_file = ".geol.yaml"
additional_context = ""
```

```{python}
#| echo: false
# --- Imports & Constants ---
import subprocess, shutil, sys, yaml, json, os, hashlib, time, html, logging
from datetime import datetime, timezone as dt_timezone
from IPython.display import display, HTML, Markdown
from packaging.version import parse as parse_v
import pandas as pd
import plotly.express as px

logging.basicConfig(level=logging.WARNING)
logger = logging.getLogger("geol-report")

RISK_THRESHOLD_DAYS = 180
SUBPROCESS_TIMEOUT = 30

COLORS = {
    "healthy": "#50fa7b",
    "warning": "#ffb86c",
    "critical": "#ff5555",
    "info": "#8be9fd",
}

SUNBURST_COLOR_MAP = {
    "EOL": COLORS["critical"],
    "Healthy": COLORS["healthy"],
    "Upcoming Risk": COLORS["warning"],
    "Untracked": COLORS["info"],
}

TIMELINE_COLOR_MAP = {
    "EOL": COLORS["critical"],
    "Active": COLORS["healthy"],
    "Upcoming": COLORS["info"],
}

start_time = time.time()
```

```{python}
#| echo: false
# --- Tool Detection & Config Loading ---

if not shutil.which("geol"):
    display(HTML("<h2><span class='fa-solid fa-triangle-exclamation'></span> [CRITICAL ERROR] geol is NOT installed</h2>"))
    raise RuntimeError("geol CLI is not installed. Install from https://github.com/opt-nc/geol")

try:
    geol_version = subprocess.run(
        ['geol', 'version'], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=SUBPROCESS_TIMEOUT
    ).stdout.strip()
    quarto_version = subprocess.run(
        ['quarto', '--version'], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=SUBPROCESS_TIMEOUT
    ).stdout.strip()
    uv_version = subprocess.run(
        ['uv', '--version'], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=SUBPROCESS_TIMEOUT
    ).stdout.strip().replace('uv ', '')
    import packaging
    packaging_version = packaging.__version__
except Exception as e:
    logger.warning("Failed to detect tool versions: %s", e)
    geol_version = quarto_version = uv_version = packaging_version = "Unknown"

# Git Detection
git_commit = None
config_git_commit = None
try:
    if shutil.which("git"):
        is_git = subprocess.run(
            ['git', 'rev-parse', '--is-inside-work-tree'],
            capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=SUBPROCESS_TIMEOUT,
        )
        if is_git.returncode == 0:
            git_commit = subprocess.run(
                ['git', 'rev-parse', 'HEAD'],
                capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=SUBPROCESS_TIMEOUT,
            ).stdout.strip()
            config_git_res = subprocess.run(
                ['git', 'log', '-n', '1', '--format=%H', '--', config_file],
                capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=SUBPROCESS_TIMEOUT,
            )
            if config_git_res.returncode == 0 and config_git_res.stdout.strip():
                config_git_commit = config_git_res.stdout.strip()
except Exception as e:
    logger.warning("Git detection failed: %s", e)

# Load Config
with open(config_file, 'rb') as f:
    config_bytes = f.read()
    config_sha256 = hashlib.sha256(config_bytes).hexdigest()
    config_raw = config_bytes.decode('utf-8')
    config_data = yaml.safe_load(config_raw)

app_name = html.escape(config_data.get('app_name', 'Unnamed Project'))
```

```{python}
#| echo: false
# --- Data Fetching & Enrichment ---

# Run geol check with output validation
result = subprocess.run(
    ['geol', 'check', config_file, '--json'],
    capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=SUBPROCESS_TIMEOUT,
)
try:
    check_data = json.loads(result.stdout)
    df_raw = pd.DataFrame(check_data['software_components'])
except (json.JSONDecodeError, KeyError) as e:
    display(HTML(
        f"<h2><span class='fa-solid fa-triangle-exclamation'></span> geol check failed</h2>"
        f"<pre>{html.escape(result.stderr or str(e))}</pre>"
    ))
    raise RuntimeError(f"geol check produced invalid output: {e}")

# Build ID mapping and fetch product extended data ONCE (cached)
name_to_id = {
    str(item.get('name')).strip().lower(): item.get('id_eol')
    for item in config_data.get('stack', [])
}
ids_to_check = list(set([
    item['id_eol']
    for item in config_data.get('stack', [])
    if 'id_eol' in item and not item.get('skip', False)
]))

product_extended_cache = {}
for product_id in ids_to_check:
    try:
        res = subprocess.run(
            ['geol', 'product', 'extended', product_id, '--json'],
            capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=SUBPROCESS_TIMEOUT,
        )
        if res.returncode == 0:
            data = json.loads(res.stdout)
            if data:
                product_extended_cache[product_id] = data[0]
    except Exception as e:
        logger.warning("Failed to fetch extended data for %s: %s", product_id, e)

# Build LTS map from cached data
lts_map = {}
for product_id, product_data in product_extended_cache.items():
    lts_cycles = [
        str(rel.get('cycle')).strip()
        for rel in product_data.get('releases', [])
        if rel.get('isLts')
    ]
    if lts_cycles:
        lts_map[product_id] = lts_cycles


def enrich_row(row):
    software_name = str(row['software']).strip().lower()
    product_id = name_to_id.get(software_name)
    version_str = str(row['version']).strip()

    # LTS detection
    row['is_lts'] = False
    if product_id in lts_map:
        cycles = lts_map[product_id]
        if version_str in cycles or any(version_str.startswith(c + '.') for c in cycles):
            row['is_lts'] = True

    # Version lag analysis
    latest_str = str(row['latest_version']).strip()
    if not latest_str or latest_str == '-' or version_str == latest_str:
        row['lag'] = 'Current'
    else:
        try:
            current_ver = parse_v(version_str)
            latest_ver = parse_v(latest_str)
            if latest_ver > current_ver:
                current_major = current_ver.release[0] if current_ver.release else None
                latest_major = latest_ver.release[0] if latest_ver.release else None
                row['lag'] = 'Major Lag' if current_major != latest_major else 'Minor Lag'
            else:
                row['lag'] = 'Current'
        except Exception:
            row['lag'] = 'Major Lag' if version_str.split('.')[0] != latest_str.split('.')[0] else 'Minor Lag'

    # Software link
    if row['status'] != 'UNKNOWN':
        eol_slug = product_id if product_id else software_name
        row['soft_html'] = f'<a href="https://endoflife.date/{eol_slug}" target="_blank">{html.escape(row["software"])}</a>'
    else:
        row['soft_html'] = html.escape(row['software'])

    return row


df_raw = df_raw.apply(enrich_row, axis=1)

# Add skipped products
skipped_products = [item for item in config_data.get('stack', []) if item.get('skip', False)]
if skipped_products:
    skipped_rows = [{
        'software': item.get('name', 'Unknown'),
        'version': item.get('version', ''),
        'status': 'UNKNOWN',
        'eol_date': '',
        'days': '',
        'latest_version': '',
        'is_latest': False,
        'lag': 'Untracked',
        'is_lts': False,
        'soft_html': html.escape(item.get('name', 'Unknown')),
    } for item in skipped_products]
    df_raw = pd.concat([df_raw, pd.DataFrame(skipped_rows)], ignore_index=True)

# Compute metrics
df_raw['days_num'] = pd.to_numeric(df_raw['days'], errors='coerce').fillna(float('inf'))
total_comp = len(df_raw)
eol_comp = len(df_raw[df_raw['status'] == 'EOL'])
upcoming_risks = df_raw[
    (df_raw['status'] == 'OK') & (df_raw['days_num'] > 0) & (df_raw['days_num'] < RISK_THRESHOLD_DAYS)
]
upcoming_count = len(upcoming_risks)
ok_comp = len(df_raw[df_raw['status'] == 'OK']) - upcoming_count
untracked_comp = len(df_raw[df_raw['status'] == 'UNKNOWN'])
```

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis
# --- Dashboard Header & Metrics ---

print(f'<script>document.title = "{app_name} geol EoL stack reporting";</script>')
display(HTML(f'<div class="report-header"><h1><span class="fa-solid fa-hourglass-half"></span> {app_name} Geol EoL stack reporting</h1></div>'))
display(HTML(f'<div style="text-align: center; margin: 20px 0;"><a href="https://github.com/opt-nc/geol" target="_blank"><img src="https://github.com/opt-nc/geol/blob/main/assets/logos/dist/logo-with-name-gradient-black.jpeg?raw=true" alt="Geol Logo" style="max-width: 300px; border-radius: 8px;"></a></div>'))
display(Markdown("## <span class='fa-solid fa-circle-info'></span> Abstract"))
print(f"This report provides an EOL analysis for **{app_name}**. Generated using [geol](https://opt-nc.github.io/geol/).")

display(HTML(f"""
<div class="protip-box" style="font-size: 0.85rem; background: rgba(80, 250, 123, 0.05); border: 1px solid {COLORS['healthy']}; padding: 10px; border-radius: 5px; margin: 15px 0;">
    <span class="fa-solid fa-file-pdf"></span> <strong>Pro Tip:</strong> Want a PDF? Simply press <code>Ctrl+P</code> (or <code>Cmd+P</code>) in your browser. The report will automatically switch to a clean, white "Executive Print Mode" optimized for paper and PDF sharing.
</div>
"""))

if additional_context and str(additional_context).strip():
    display(HTML("<h2><span class='fa-solid fa-note-sticky'></span> Additional context</h2>"))
    print(additional_context)

display(HTML(f"""
<div style="display: flex; gap: 20px; margin-top: 20px; flex-wrap: wrap;">
    <div class="metric-card" style="flex: 1; min-width: 150px;"><span class="fa-solid fa-layer-group metric-icon"></span><span class="metric-label">Total Stack</span><span class="metric-value">{total_comp}</span></div>
    <div class="metric-card" style="flex: 1; min-width: 150px;"><span class="fa-solid fa-circle-check metric-icon status-ok"></span><span class="metric-label">Healthy</span><span class="metric-value status-ok">{ok_comp}</span></div>
    <div class="metric-card" style="flex: 1; min-width: 150px;"><span class="fa-solid fa-triangle-exclamation metric-icon status-warning"></span><span class="metric-label">Upcoming Risks</span><span class="metric-value status-warning">{upcoming_count}</span></div>
    <div class="metric-card" style="flex: 1; min-width: 150px;"><span class="fa-solid fa-fire-flame-curved metric-icon status-eol"></span><span class="metric-label">End of Life</span><span class="metric-value status-eol">{eol_comp}</span></div>
</div>
"""))

display(Markdown(f"""
- <span class='fa-solid fa-layer-group'></span> **Total Stack:** Complete inventory of software components.
- <span class='fa-solid fa-circle-check status-ok'></span> **Healthy:** Supported components with a safe timeframe.
- <span class='fa-solid fa-triangle-exclamation status-warning'></span> **Upcoming Risks:** Reaching EOL within {RISK_THRESHOLD_DAYS} days.
- <span class='fa-solid fa-fire-flame-curved status-eol'></span> **End of Life:** Critical items requiring immediate replacement.
"""))

display(Markdown("## <span class='fa-solid fa-database'></span> Report Metadata"))
now_local = datetime.now().astimezone()
now_utc = datetime.now(dt_timezone.utc)

metadata_items = []
metadata_items.append(f"<li><span class='fa-solid fa-clock'></span> <strong>Local:</strong> {now_local.strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S %Z')}</li>")
metadata_items.append(f"<li><span class='fa-solid fa-earth-americas'></span> <strong>UTC:</strong> {now_utc.strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S UTC')}</li>")

if git_commit:
    metadata_items.append(f"<li><span class='fa-brands fa-git-alt'></span> <strong>Workspace Git Commit:</strong> <code>{git_commit[:8]}</code></li>")
if config_git_commit:
    metadata_items.append(f"<li><span class='fa-solid fa-code-commit'></span> <strong>geol input check file commit:</strong> <code>{config_git_commit[:8]}</code></li>")

metadata_items.append(f"<li><span class='fa-brands fa-python'></span> <strong>Python:</strong> {sys.version.split()[0]}</li>")
metadata_items.append(f"<li><span class='fa-solid fa-bolt'></span> <strong><a href='https://docs.astral.sh/uv/' target='_blank'>UV</a>:</strong> {uv_version}</li>")
metadata_items.append(f"<li><span class='fa-solid fa-gears'></span> <strong><a href='https://github.com/opt-nc/geol' target='_blank'>Geol</a>:</strong> {geol_version}</li>")
metadata_items.append(f"<li><span class='fa-solid fa-box-open'></span> <strong><a href='https://pypi.org/project/packaging/' target='_blank'>Packaging</a>:</strong> {packaging_version} (used for robust SemVer and Calendar version comparison, following the <a href='https://peps.python.org/pep-0440/' target='_blank'>PEP 440</a> initiative)</li>")
metadata_items.append(f"<li><span class='fa-solid fa-book-open'></span> <strong><a href='https://quarto.org/' target='_blank'>Quarto</a>:</strong> {quarto_version}</li>")
metadata_items.append(f"<li><span class='fa-solid fa-file-code'></span> <strong>geol input check file:</strong> <code>{config_file}</code> (SHA-256: <code>{config_sha256[:12]}...</code>)</li>")
metadata_items.append(f"<li><span class='fa-solid fa-link'></span> <strong>Data Source:</strong> <a href='https://endoflife.date/docs/api/v1' target='_blank'>endoflife.date API</a></li>")

display(HTML("<ul>" + "".join(metadata_items) + "</ul>"))
```

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false
# --- Status Overview (Sunburst Chart) ---

display(Markdown("## <span class='fa-solid fa-chart-pie'></span> Status Overview"))

if not df_raw.empty:
    df_raw['Root'] = app_name
    df_raw['Chart_Status'] = df_raw.apply(
        lambda r: 'EOL' if r['status'] == 'EOL'
        else 'Untracked' if r['status'] == 'UNKNOWN'
        else 'Upcoming Risk' if r['days_num'] < RISK_THRESHOLD_DAYS
        else 'Healthy',
        axis=1,
    )
    fig_sun = px.sunburst(
        df_raw,
        path=['Root', 'Chart_Status', 'software'],
        color='Chart_Status',
        color_discrete_map=SUNBURST_COLOR_MAP,
    )
    fig_sun.update_layout(
        template="plotly_dark",
        paper_bgcolor='rgba(0,0,0,0)',
        plot_bgcolor='rgba(0,0,0,0)',
        margin=dict(t=0, b=0, l=0, r=0),
        height=450,
    )
    display(fig_sun)

    findings = ""
    if eol_comp > 0:
        findings += f'<div class="finding-box finding-critical"><div class="finding-icon"><span class="fa-solid fa-fire-flame-curved"></span></div><div class="finding-text"><strong>Critical Risk:</strong> {eol_comp} past EOL.</div></div>'
    if upcoming_count > 0:
        findings += f'<div class="finding-box finding-warning"><div class="finding-icon"><span class="fa-solid fa-triangle-exclamation"></span></div><div class="finding-text"><strong>Upcoming:</strong> {upcoming_count} reach EOL soon.</div></div>'
    if not findings:
        findings = '<div class="finding-box finding-safe"><div class="finding-icon"><span class="fa-solid fa-circle-check"></span></div><div class="finding-text"><strong>Healthy:</strong> All components are supported.</div></div>'
    display(HTML(findings))
```

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis
# --- Stack Status (DataTable) ---

display(Markdown("## <span class='fa-solid fa-list-check'></span> Stack Status"))

try:
    df = df_raw.copy()
    df['sort_rank'] = df.apply(
        lambda r: 0 if r['status'] == 'EOL'
        else 1 if (r['status'] == 'OK' and r['days_num'] < RISK_THRESHOLD_DAYS)
        else 2 if r['status'] == 'OK'
        else 3,
        axis=1,
    )
    df = df.sort_values(by=['sort_rank', 'days_num'], ascending=[True, True])

    def style_status(row):
        status, days = row['status'], row['days_num']
        if status == 'EOL':
            return f'<span class="fa-solid fa-circle-exclamation"></span> <span style="color:{COLORS["critical"]}; font-weight:bold;">{status}</span>'
        if status == 'UNKNOWN':
            return f'<span class="fa-solid fa-circle-question"></span> <span style="color:{COLORS["info"]};">{status}</span>'
        if days < RISK_THRESHOLD_DAYS:
            return f'<span class="fa-solid fa-triangle-exclamation"></span> <span style="color:{COLORS["warning"]}; font-weight:bold;">WARNING</span>'
        return f'<span class="fa-solid fa-circle-check"></span> <span style="color:{COLORS["healthy"]};">{status}</span>'

    def style_version(row):
        version = str(row['version'])
        if row.get('is_lts') is True:
            return f'{html.escape(version)} <span class="fa-solid fa-shield-halved" title="Long Term Support (LTS)"></span>'
        return html.escape(version)

    def style_lag(lag_value):
        if lag_value == 'Current':
            color = COLORS["healthy"]
        elif lag_value == 'Minor Lag':
            color = COLORS["warning"]
        elif lag_value == 'Major Lag':
            color = COLORS["critical"]
        else:
            color = COLORS["info"]
        icon = "fa-circle-check" if lag_value == "Current" else "fa-circle-chevron-up"
        return f'<span style="color:{color};"><span class="fa-solid {icon}"></span> {lag_value}</span>'

    df['Stat'] = df.apply(style_status, axis=1)
    df['Ver'] = df.apply(style_version, axis=1)
    df['Lag'] = df['lag'].apply(style_lag)

    table_html = '<table id="stack-table" class="display table nowrap" style="width:100%"><thead><tr class="thead-dark"><th>Software</th><th>Version</th><th>Status</th><th>Lag</th><th>EOL Date</th><th>Latest</th></tr></thead><tbody>'
    for _, row in df.iterrows():
        table_html += f'<tr><td>{row["soft_html"]}</td><td>{row["Ver"]}</td><td>{row["Stat"]}</td><td>{row["Lag"]}</td><td>{row["eol_date"]}</td><td>{row["latest_version"]}</td></tr>'
    table_html += '</tbody></table>'
    table_html += '<script>$(document).ready(function() { if (!$.fn.DataTable.isDataTable("#stack-table")) { $("#stack-table").DataTable({ dom: "Bfrtip", buttons: ["copy", "csv", "excel", "print", "colvis"], pageLength: 15, responsive: true, order: [] }); } });</script>'
    display(HTML(table_html))
except Exception as e:
    logger.error("Failed to render Stack Status table: %s", e)
    print(f"Error: {e}")
```

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false
# --- Lifecycle Timeline (using cached data) ---

display(Markdown("## <span class='fa-solid fa-calendar-days'></span> Lifecycle Timeline"))

lifecycle_events = []
for product_id, product_data in product_extended_cache.items():
    try:
        for release in product_data.get('releases', [])[:6]:
            start_date = release.get('releaseDate')
            end_date = release.get('eolFrom')
            cycle = release.get('cycle', 'unknown')
            if start_date and end_date and end_date != "false":
                try:
                    start_dt = datetime.strptime(start_date, '%Y-%m-%d')
                    end_dt = datetime.strptime(end_date, '%Y-%m-%d')
                    today = datetime.now()
                    if end_dt < today:
                        status = "EOL"
                    elif start_dt <= today <= end_dt:
                        status = "Active"
                    else:
                        status = "Upcoming"
                    lifecycle_events.append({
                        "Product": product_data['name'],
                        "Cycle": str(cycle),
                        "Start": start_date,
                        "End": end_date,
                        "Status": status,
                        "Label": f"{product_data['name']} {cycle}",
                    })
                except (ValueError, KeyError) as e:
                    logger.warning("Skipping malformed release for %s cycle %s: %s", product_id, cycle, e)
    except Exception as e:
        logger.warning("Failed to process timeline for %s: %s", product_id, e)

if lifecycle_events:
    df_lifecycle = pd.DataFrame(lifecycle_events)
    fig = px.timeline(
        df_lifecycle,
        x_start="Start",
        x_end="End",
        y="Product",
        color="Status",
        hover_name="Label",
        text="Cycle",
        color_discrete_map=TIMELINE_COLOR_MAP,
        category_orders={"Status": ["Active", "Upcoming", "EOL"]},
    )
    fig.update_yaxes(autorange="reversed")
    fig.update_layout(
        template="plotly_dark",
        paper_bgcolor='rgba(0,0,0,0)',
        plot_bgcolor='rgba(0,0,0,0)',
        height=400 + (len(df_lifecycle['Product'].unique()) * 30),
        xaxis_title="",
    )
    fig.add_vline(x=datetime.now().timestamp() * 1000, line_dash="dash", line_color="white")
    display(fig)
```

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis
# --- Configuration Source & Footer ---

display(Markdown("## <span class='fa-solid fa-code'></span> Configuration Source"))
print(f"""
<details>
    <summary style="cursor: pointer; padding: 10px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.05); border-radius: 5px; margin-bottom: 10px;">
        <span class="fa-solid fa-file-invoice"></span> Click to view the <code>geol</code> input configuration
    </summary>
    <p style="margin-top: 10px;">Built using <code>geol check</code>. (see <a href="https://opt-nc.github.io/geol/docs/tutorial-basics/check-command" target="_blank">tutorial</a> for more)</p>
""")
print(f"```yaml\n{config_raw}\n```")
print("</details>")

display(Markdown("## <span class='fa-solid fa-handshake-angle'></span> License & Contribution"))

generation_duration = round(time.time() - start_time, 2)
generation_date = datetime.now().strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S %Z')

display(HTML(f"""
<div style="font-size: 1rem; margin-bottom: 30px;">
    <p><span class="fa-solid fa-code-fork"></span> <strong>Open Source & Customizable</strong></p>
    <p>This reporting notebook is open-source and part of the <a href="https://github.com/opt-nc/geol" target="_blank">geol project</a> ecosystem. You are encouraged to fork this repository and customize it to meet your specific auditing needs, and share your contributions back with the community.</p>
    <p><span class="fa-solid fa-scale-balanced"></span> <strong>Disclaimer & License</strong></p>
    <p>This tool is provided "as is", without warranty of any kind, under the <a href="https://github.com/opt-nc/geol/blob/main/LICENSE" target="_blank">geol license</a>. It is designed to assist decision-making through KPIs, but the authors are not accountable for governance choices or technical implementations made based on this report.</p>
    <p><span class="fa-solid fa-gears"></span> <strong>Build Information</strong></p>
    <p>Generated with <a href="https://github.com/opt-nc/geol" target="_blank">geol</a> and <a href="https://quarto.org/" target="_blank">Quarto</a> on <strong>{generation_date}</strong> in <strong>{generation_duration} seconds</strong>.</p>
    <p><em>End-of-Life data provided by the <a href="https://endoflife.date/" target="_blank">endoflife.date</a> API.</em></p>
</div>
"""))
```
